name: ADSelfService Plus
banner: ADSelfService Plus criteria are pending official source verification. Please provide the official AD360 Health Check Criteria txt file.

criteria.text: ADSelfService Plus service is running under a dedicated service account

criteria.text: ADSelfService Plus is on the latest available build
